race.comment: ALBASTI TAY (1) Having first race start for trainer G SubaşI. MüSlüM çEli̇K is a plus. Watch the betting. ANGELOVA (2) First race start for trainer M A Turan. Watch the market moves. KONÇIÇEK (8) First starter for trainer MüSlüM Dolak and has drawn the rails. MüSlüM çEli̇K is an advantage. Watch betting. YAMAN ÖZGE (14) Initial appearance for H Sunkar. Jockey Ahmet çEli̇K is a strong choice aboard. Watch betting.
